# NightDesk -- AI Receptionist and Direct Booking Agency for Hotels

NightDesk helps boutique hotels and independent properties get more direct bookings using AI receptionists, Google Ads, and booking optimization.

SERVICES:
1. AI Receptionist ($600-1,000/month): Custom AI chatbot answering guest questions 24/7
2. Google Ads Management ($1,000-1,500/month): Hotel-specific campaigns for direct bookings
3. Direct Booking Optimization ($500-800/month): Converting visitors into direct bookings
4. Complete Package ($2,000-2,500/month): All three services combined

WHO WE SERVE: Boutique hotels (10-150 rooms), independent properties, small chains, B&Bs
KEY RESULTS: 80% reduction in unanswered inquiries | 3-5 extra direct bookings/month | 2-3 week setup
TECHNOLOGY: Claude AI (Anthropic), Google Ads, Voiceflow

PAGES: nightdesk.agency | /ai-receptionist | /google-ads | /direct-booking | /complete-package | /about | /faq | /blog | /contact | /pricing
